_meta._doc: Externalised user-facing copy strings. Edit this file (or replace via Supabase content-pull in Phase 2) to change copy without a code deploy. Keys are dot-separated by surface + slot. Missing keys fall back to the second argument passed to useContent(key, fallback) — so inline removals here degrade safely. Phase-1 scope: heros + empty states (~40 keys). Phase 2 expands to long-form panels.

common.fcaFooter: Information only · Derived from your data · Not regulated advice
common.emptyGeneric: No data yet — add details to populate this view.
common.errorFallback: Something went wrong loading this view. Refresh to try again.

home.emptyState: Add a salary, savings or property to see your full picture.

welcome.subhead: See, score, and grow your financial world — one place for every part of your money life.
welcome.previewFootnote: Example scores. Yours is calculated from your real money picture.

money.emptyAssets: Add an asset to start your balance sheet — a salary or savings account works.
money.emptyLiabilities: No debts on file. Add a mortgage or loan if you have one.
money.businessEmpty: No business interests on file. Add a director shareholding to see retained-profit, dividend and BPR analysis.
money.trustsEmpty: No trusts on file. Add a settlor or beneficiary role to see IHT positioning.
money.protectionEmpty: No protection cover on file. Life, critical illness and income protection sit here once added.

income.subtitle: What comes in, what HMRC takes, what you keep.
income.emptyHeadline: Add an income source to see your tax stack.
income.footerNote: Information based on UK 2026/27 rules. Not personal advice.

cashflow.emptyState: Add income and essentials to see your cashflow story.
cashflow.noBillsState: No bills detected yet. Bill calendar populates once you add fixed bills (+ Bill) or connect Open Banking.
cashflow.noSubsState: Recurring-charge detection arrives with Open Banking (Phase 1.2). Until then, add subscriptions manually so they appear in your essentials total.

tax.noTaxData: Add income and assets to see your tax position.
tax.noEstateData: Add property and pension to see your IHT exposure.
tax.ihtProjectionNote: Projections use frozen nil-rate bands and current rules. Budget changes update overnight.

risk.noRiskData: Add at least one investment or pension to see your risk profile.

timeline.noEvents: No scheduled tax or pension events for the next 12 months.

ask.disclaimer: Sonu is information-only and never makes regulated recommendations. Verify decisions with a qualified UK financial adviser.
ask.emptyState: Start a conversation — ask about ISAs, pensions, IHT, drawdown rates, or anything in your dashboard.

onboarding.welcomeSub: We'll walk through your money in 4 steps. Skip anything you don't have yet — you can add it later.
onboarding.savedHint: Saved — pick up where you left off any time.
onboarding.incompleteHint: We've saved what you entered. Come back any time to finish.

legal.fcaBoundary: Sonuswealth provides information and guidance, not regulated financial advice. We don't recommend specific products, brokers, or platforms.
legal.privacyShort: We store your figures so we can show them back to you — nothing is sold or shared. Read the full privacy policy.
